entries.claim: WorkManager publishes foreground state before device snapshot, encrypted bootstrap, or native job execution.
A Strong-Biometric cipher failure fails closed instead of downgrading to device credential.
Mobile Agent confirmation checks the pending binding and biometric token before consuming the Agent one-time token.
Android Keystore installs a hardware-backed wrapping key, seals the provider credential store, and rejects a corrupt wrapped key without replacement.
The Activity and WorkManager Worker run in the same Android process.
Retryable mobile-job errors requeue through typed state without retaining the lease owner.
A real native prompt cancel causes no mutation; physical device-credential approval arms only the matching action and the effect is reverted.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro app flow with native prompt, CDP observation, and Graph/store verification

entries.claim: A real app-OAuth Codex tool call composes Agent PendingAction confirmation with native user presence; cancel is inert and approval changes exactly the intended Graph object.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro Agent live-write flow with app OAuth, CDP stream, Graph verification, and revert

entries.claim: A real backup runs under a visible dataSync foreground notification with safe generic text.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro backup with bounded foreground hold and filtered dumpsys/UI capture

entries.claim: Notification denial leaves the valid job queued without engine start, lease, or Graph effect; restoring permission reconciles the same job.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro notification-permission denial and restore flow

entries.claim: Killing the app after the cloud effect but before local completion recovers to one result without duplication.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro bounded after-execute process-death hook, relaunch, Graph count, and revert

entries.claim: A deterministic in-app network failure requeues a real-token job and succeeds after restoration without losing USB ADB or duplicating the effect.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro debug-only network-failure marker, real job retry, marker removal, and reconciliation
entries.notes: This is the user-directed app-level recovery proof; Android retained a validated network throughout.

entries.claim: Restore-cloud creates exactly one Graph object and all device-created fixtures are reverted or deleted.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro restore-cloud and Agent live-write Graph verify/revert sequence

entries.claim: The independently clean-built default APK contains no recovery test-hook strings and is the final APK installed on the device.
entries.command: unzip -p /tmp/isyncyou-issue-626-apks/isyncyou-626-default-final.apk lib/arm64-v8a/libisyncyou_mobile.so | strings | rg 'mobile-job-hook|mobile job device-test hold|mobile-job-network-offline'
entries.notes: Pass means the negative scan produced no matches.

entries.claim: All deliberately changed device settings were restored and all temporary token, marker, forward, and fixture state was removed.
entries.command: Physical Pixel 8 Pro post-test state readback and cleanup
